mapper.select: SELECT t.node_id, t.node_hash, t.node_template_id, t.node_template_name, t.node_name, t.node_description, t.node_color, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.field_id, t.topic_id, t.article_id, t.sequence_id FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY node_hash ORDER BY create_time ASC) AS rn FROM graph_node WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1

SELECT t.node_id, t.node_hash, t.node_template_id, t.node_template_name, t.node_name, t.node_description, t.node_color, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.field_id, t.topic_id, t.article_id, t.sequence_id FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY node_hash ORDER BY create_time ASC) AS rn FROM graph_node WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1

SELECT t.node_id, t.node_hash, t.node_template_id, t.node_template_name, t.node_name, t.node_description, t.node_color, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.field_id, t.topic_id, t.article_id, t.sequence_id FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY node_hash ORDER BY create_time ASC) AS rn FROM graph_node WHERE field_id = #{fieldId} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1
